# Lebanonsportsnews

> Sports portal focused on live football updates, match center data, highlights, and sports news.

## Site
- Base URL: https://lebanonsportsnews.com/
- News page: https://lebanonsportsnews.com/news.html
- Primary language: en

## Content Summary
- Live match updates and schedules
- Sports headlines and breaking news
- Team and league highlights
- Multi-language UI and regional sports context

## Crawl Guidance
- Public pages may be indexed.
- Prefer canonical URLs from page metadata.
- Use sitemap for URL discovery: https://lebanonsportsnews.com/sitemap.xml
